# DJAMP PRO Code of Conduct

## Our Standard

DJAMP PRO is committed to a friendly, safe, and respectful community for all contributors and users.

Expected behavior:
- Be respectful and constructive.
- Assume good intent.
- Focus on technical issues and reproducible facts.
- Accept feedback professionally.

Unacceptable behavior:
- Harassment, insults, discrimination, or personal attacks.
- Publishing private or sensitive information.
- Trolling, intimidation, or hostile conduct.

## Scope

This policy applies in repository discussions, issues, pull requests, and project communication channels.

## Reporting

Report violations to: `security@djamp-pro.dev`.

Project maintainers may remove, edit, or reject comments/issues/PRs that violate this policy.
